creator: raimeetravel
caption:
Most ski seasons are wrapping up… but in Banff, the season’s still going ⛷️☀️

One of the wildest things about this part of Alberta? You can actually ski into SUMMER at Banff Sunshine Village with special summer skiing days running June 20–July 5! Right now, the mountain is open until May 18 before reopening for those iconic summer laps.

 If you’re looking for a last-minute mountain escape from the US, this is such an easy win:

 • direct flights from major US cities
 • unreal scenery in every direction
 • spring skiing without the deep-freeze temps
 • long sunny days + fewer crowds
 • ski all day, patio après after 🍹
And honestly, spring/summer in Banff barely looks real. Turquoise lakes, snow-covered peaks, scenic drives everywhere you turn… it feels like a postcard.

🔖 Save this for your next mountain getaway & comment “ALBERTA” for more info!

#ExploreAlberta #ExploreCanada #BanffNationalPark #SpringSnowboarding #SummerSnowboarding

transcription.text: this ski resort is open later than pretty much everywhere else. it's open until may 18th but you can also ski or snowboard during these dates in june or july. this is your sign to plan a quick little weekend trip up to calgary and then hit the slopes at banff sunshine. when i tell you this might be my new favorite place to go snowboarding i am not lying. the views are insane. people thought i was in switzerland when i was posting stories about this place. the snow here is some of the best in the world especially this year and i didn't have to wait in any lines the entire time. the runs were also so long and they have options for every level and i can't forget about the not one but two heated bubble chair lifts which i was obsessed with. this one is actually brand new this year. i've been snowboarding all over the world and i would argue to say alberta has some of the best mountains i've ever been to. i skied both banff sunshine and lake louise resort so even if you can't swing the last minute trip to ski banff sunshine before july 5th this year you should save this for next year because both of these resorts are typically open until the end of april and spring skiing here is a dream
